entries.title: Relay for America runs flag from San Francisco to D.C. in message of unity
entries.description: Relay for America ran the American flag from San Francisco to Washington, D.C., this week to commemorate America's 250th birthday. entries.title: NHS to rate English trusts on tackling violence and racism towards staff
